scripts.generate: rm -rf /tmp/vg-player-generate && git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/video-gen/videogen-player.git /tmp/vg-player-generate && rsync -a --delete --exclude='.git' --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='dist' ./ /tmp/vg-player-generate/ && cd /tmp/vg-player-generate && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || (git commit -m 'Sync from monorepo' && git push) && rm -rf /tmp/vg-player-generate
scripts.publish: rm -rf /tmp/vg-player-publish && git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/video-gen/videogen-player.git /tmp/vg-player-publish && cd /tmp/vg-player-publish && pnpm install && pnpm build && npm publish --access public && rm -rf /tmp/vg-player-publish
scripts.release: pnpm run generate && pnpm run publish
